reasoning: Standard European availability will undoubtedly coincide with the global release of GTA VI. Considering Rockstar Games set a 'Fall 2025' window, any substantial delay would push the release into 2026. Given Rockstar's history with game delays (GTA V, RDR2) a delay to 2026 remains a very realistic possibility, despite the recent reaffirmation. Therefore, I assign a 65% chance that it makes its 2025 launch target.
